command: export DISPLAY=:99 && export WINEPREFIX=/root/.wine && export WINEDEBUG=-all && export STAGING_WRITECOPY=1 && echo '=== Trying MetaEditor compile ===' && METAEDITOR='/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/metaeditor64.exe' && EA_SRC='/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/MQL5/Experts/PropFirmBot/PropFirmBot.mq5' && if [ -f "$METAEDITOR" ]; then echo 'MetaEditor found, compiling...' && wine "$METAEDITOR" /compile:"$EA_SRC" /log 2>&1 && sleep 10 && echo '=== Check .ex5 after compile ===' && find '/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/MQL5/Experts' -name '*.ex5' -ls 2>/dev/null; else echo 'MetaEditor not found'; fi
